description: 模板解释器运行时规格。重点覆盖死灵法师与猎人的新模板，并给出事件触发、状态字段和结算顺序。

runtimeEvents.description: 单位回合开始时触发。可用于 DOT、自动亡灵伤害、回合开始抽牌前的被动。
单位回合结束时触发。可用于回合结束清理、到回合末消失的 buff。
抽到牌后触发。可用于格挡自动结算、炸弹牌爆炸、召唤 token 激活。
即将造成伤害时触发。可用于标记加成、暴击、额外伤害修正。
伤害结算后触发。可用于吸血、命中后插牌、Faith 或 Soul Shard 获得。
普通攻击命中时触发。可用于盗贼、萨满、猎人标记兑现。
职业技能使用时触发。可用于 Faith、Soul Shard 消耗、职业限制校验。
陷阱被踩中时触发。可用于猎人陷阱与标记联动。

steps: Create token card by tokenKey
Insert into owner deck or discard according to config
Shuffle if shuffleIntoDeck is true
Move card to showcase zone
Increase player.activeSummons[tokenType] by insertCount
Do not keep this token in hand
For each configured token type, read player.activeSummons[tokenType]
Repeat damagePerToken that many times against the enemy
Each packet is a separate damage event
notes: This lets skeleton and bone_dragon feel different.
Separate packets allow shields and passives to interact more naturally.

steps: Start with baseDamage
Read current counts for each token type in consumeTokenTypes
Add bonusByTokenType[tokenType] for each token consumed
Apply final damage as AOE or targeted burst according to range and radius
Set all consumed token type counts to 0
notes: Explosion should consume active summons after calculating bonus.
This is the primary conversion from setup to burst.

steps: Set target.marks[markType] to true
If durationMode is turn_limited, also attach expiry counter
If mark already exists, refresh rather than stack unless config says otherwise
Check whether target has required mark
If yes, add configured bonusDamage or replace damage if needed
Queue bonusDraw and bonusMove for post-hit resolution
If consumeMark is true, clear the mark after successful hit
Apply base trap damage and control
If target has mark, add configured marked bonus
If consumeMark is true, remove mark
Reveal the negative card
Resolve onDrawEffect immediately
Apply damage and statuses
Move resolved negative card to discard or showcase according to config
Attach target.controlTags.silence_bucket_lock for configured turns
While active, block use of class_or_guardian bucket
notes: Useful for Priest silence and future anti-caster tools.
